page_desc: Whether you want to start a business yourself, or you are an organisation helping others do it — we have a programme for you.
individuals_heading: A step-by-step path to starting your business.
individuals_desc: We meet you where you are. Step 1: we teach you how to build it. Step 2: we help you build it and launch it. Step 3: we build and launch it for you. Most of our participants are busy. They have jobs, families, and limited time. Our structure is built around that reality.
accelerator_desc: We teach you everything you need to know to start a business. Learn at your own pace, on your own time. Video lessons that walk you through every step, from testing your idea to getting your first paying client.
dwy_desc: We help you build your business and launch it. An experienced founder works with you every week — coaching, challenging, and keeping you on track from first idea through to first paying client.
dfy_desc: You have the idea. We do the rest. Our team builds your entire business from the ground up and hands it to you ready to operate. No guesswork. No learning curve. Just a business that works.
organisations_desc: We partner with universities, local authorities, government agencies, charities, prisons, and corporate organisations to deliver structured business education to people at the earliest stages of enterprise.
partners_heading: Clear delivery. Measurable results. Proper reporting.
cta_heading: Ready to talk about a programme for your community?
cta_desc: Tell us who you are trying to help, what you want to achieve, and when you need it. We will come back to you with a proposal.
